stories.headline: PM Modi secures nearly $40 billion in investments from five-nation tour

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: You know how much investment PM Modi secured during his recent 5-country visit? -Answer: Approx. $40 billion. Sadly, nobody is talking about it. People are rather mocking him...

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🚨 BREAKING NEWS PM Modi’s recent five-nation tour helped India secure an investment pipeline worth nearly $40 BILLION.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Met President Sergio Mattarella in Rome. We discussed different aspects relating to the India-Italy friendship, including trade, investment and cultural linkages.

stories.headline: Iran and Oman discuss toll system for Strait of Hormuz

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Iran’s new definition of “managing” the Strait of Hormuz effectively extends its claimed regulatory zone into parts of UAE and Omani waters. This will not go well.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: ⚡️JUST IN: Iran and Oman are seriously discussing setting up a Permanent Toll System for the Strait of Hormuz

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Breaking News: Iran and Oman are in talks over a payment system for ships crossing the Strait of Hormuz, despite warnings from the Trump administration.

stories.headline: House Republicans cancel vote on resolution to limit Trump’s Iran military actions after lacking votes

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Breaking News: House Republicans abruptly canceled a vote on a resolution directing President Trump to withdraw U.S. forces from Iran or win approval from Congress to continue the war, after it became clear they lacked the votes to defeat the measure.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Republicans knew the War Powers Resolution to rein in Trump’s Iran War was about to pass—so they pulled the bill off the floor. When they can’t win, they hide. Vote them out.

stories.headline: US releases second batch of UAP/UFO files from Department of War

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: SECOND RELEASE OF UNIDENTIFIED ANOMALOUS PHENOMENA FILES 🛸⬇️ https://www.war.gov/UFO/

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🚨 Rep. Eric Burlison says out of 52 upcoming UFO videos, one left the entire room gasping. While some are just birds or balloons, this specific object instantly accelerated to Mach speed: "There's not a single aerial thing that can do something like that."

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: A new batch of UFO files released and once again we are left stunned and amazed with these convincing videos and images of... For fuck sakes.

stories.headline: Trump announces 5,000 U.S. troops to Poland after withdrawing from Germany

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 🚨 JUST IN: Trump says he’ll be deploying 5,000 troops to POLAND, shortly after WITHDRAWING 5,000 from Germany If our troops have to be in Europe, Poland is the place for them!

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: COMMENTARY: Let’s say it plainly: There has never been a president as corrupt as Donald Trump. There is no close second in our history.

stories.headline: Crypto speculators shifting markets toward short-term horizons
stories.body:
crypto is dominated by speculators and younger traders who have virtually no time horizon or attention span

as crypto takes over, same thing is happening to all markets

in such a world, there's great edge in simply having a boomer time horizon

all my big wins have been buying distressed assets, working to improve them, and thinking in terms of years vs. weeks

stories.headline: Waller delivers hawkish speech on recent inflation
stories.body: This is a hawkish speech from Waller. While he doesn’t think hikes are needed in the near-term, he comes across as quite troubled by recent inflation developments. I’ll thread a few highlights:

Get ready.

【害悪度SS+】

竹前美結(25) 指示役
竹前海斗(28) 指示役
闇バイト(16) 4人

備考
・栃木県の豪邸に侵入し強盗殺人

・被害者の飼い犬も殺害

stories.headline: Dr. Mary Talley Bowden discusses health issues from COVID shots on Rogan

1️⃣ Codex can now securely use apps on your Mac from your phone, even when your Mac is locked and the screen is off.

https://developers.openai.com/codex/app/computer-use

stories.headline: AI models tested on forecasting real scientific breakthroughs
stories.body:
AI is now a major part of scientific research 🔬. But can it actually forecast scientific progress?

We tested 6 frontier models on 4,760 real breakthroughs under strict knowledge cutoffs.

They recognize science. They can't forecast it. 🧵⬇️

stories.headline: Thousands of Orange County residents under evacuation after toxic tank leak
stories.body: #BreakingNews: Thousands of Orange County residents are once again under evacuation orders Friday morning after a massive storage tank leak at an aerospace facility in Garden Grove continued to raise concerns overnight. https://ktla.com/news/local-news/thousands-evacuated-again-after-toxic-tank-leak-in-garden-grove/

stories.headline: Newport Beach launches new fleet of open-air trolleys for summer
stories.body: Getting around Newport Beach will be a lot easier this summer now that a new fleet of open-air trolleys are rolling through town.

stories.headline: OCFA responds to hazardous materials leak in Garden Grove
stories.body: OCFA hazardous materials teams are on scene of a leak in a large holding tank in Garden Grove. Out of an abundance of caution, areas north of Garden Grove Blvd, east of Monarch St., south of Orangewood, and west of Beach Blvd are being evacuated.
